problem id: 4ee23115
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10101100 -> 01001101
  11011101 -> 10100001
  10111000 -> 01100111
  11101000 -> 11001101
  01011000 -> 10111011
  01100101 -> 11000110
  00100111 -> 01001010
  01011001 -> 10111001
  10001001 -> 00000011
  01011100 -> 10110011

query: 00010000
predicted answer: 00100010
